'''âng-v-g''' ('''kangavag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quislingise|quislingise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quislingise|quislingise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-v-g
|-
! Lemma
| kangavag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingavag|thingavag]] || [[word:jingavag|jingavag]] || [[word:shingavag|shingavag]] || [[word:kingavag|kingavag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungavag|thuthungavag]] || [[word:jujungavag|jujungavag]] || [[word:shushungavag|shushungavag]] || [[word:kukungavag|kukungavag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungavag|thungavag]] || [[word:jungavag|jungavag]] || [[word:shungavag|shungavag]] || [[word:kungavag|kungavag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungavag|thungavag]] || [[word:jungavag|jungavag]] || [[word:shungavag|shungavag]] || [[word:kungavag|kungavag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengavag|thengavag]] || [[word:jengavag|jengavag]] || [[word:shengavag|shengavag]] || [[word:kengavag|kengavag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongavag|thothongavag]] || [[word:jojongavag|jojongavag]] || [[word:shoshongavag|shoshongavag]] || [[word:kokongavag|kokongavag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongavag|thongavag]] || [[word:jongavag|jongavag]] || [[word:shongavag|shongavag]] || [[word:kongavag|kongavag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongavag|thongavag]] || [[word:jongavag|jongavag]] || [[word:shongavag|shongavag]] || [[word:kongavag|kongavag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngavag|thĂŠngavag]] || [[word:jĂŠngavag|jĂŠngavag]] || [[word:shĂŠngavag|shĂŠngavag]] || [[word:kĂŠngavag|kĂŠngavag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangavag|thathangavag]] || [[word:jajangavag|jajangavag]] || [[word:shashangavag|shashangavag]] || [[word:kakangavag|kakangavag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangavag|thangavag]] || [[word:jangavag|jangavag]] || [[word:shangavag|shangavag]] || [[word:kangavag|kangavag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangavag|thangavag]] || [[word:jangavag|jangavag]] || [[word:shangavag|shangavag]] || [[word:kangavag|kangavag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangavag|shangavag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangavag|goshangavag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangavag|gokishangavag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangavagnĂŒ|shangavagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangavagnknĂŒ|goshangavagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavagnĂŒ|gokishangavagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangavagshĂ«|shangavagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangavagnkshĂ«|goshangavagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangavagshĂ«|gokishangavagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavagro|shangavagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavagnkro|goshangavagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavagro|gokishangavagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavagmu|shangavagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavagnkmu|goshangavagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavagmu|gokishangavagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangavagsher|shangavagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangavagnksher|goshangavagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangavagsher|gokishangavagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangavagng|shangavagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangavagnkng|goshangavagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangavagng|gokishangavagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangavagya|shangavagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangavagnkya|goshangavagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangavagya|gokishangavagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangavagyam|shangavagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangavagnkyam|goshangavagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangavagyam|gokishangavagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavagnĂŒshĂ«|shangavagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangavagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangavagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavagnĂŒro|shangavagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavagnknĂŒro|goshangavagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavagnĂŒro|gokishangavagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavagnĂŒmu|shangavagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavagnknĂŒmu|goshangavagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavagnĂŒmu|gokishangavagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavagshĂ«nĂŒ|shangavagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangavagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangavagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavagshĂ«ro|shangavagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavagnkshĂ«ro|goshangavagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavagshĂ«ro|gokishangavagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavagshĂ«mu|shangavagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavagnkshĂ«mu|goshangavagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavagshĂ«mu|gokishangavagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavagronĂŒ|shangavagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavagnkronĂŒ|goshangavagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavagronĂŒ|gokishangavagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavagroshĂ«|shangavagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavagnkroshĂ«|goshangavagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavagroshĂ«|gokishangavagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavagromu|shangavagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavagnkromu|goshangavagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavagromu|gokishangavagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavagmunĂŒ|shangavagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavagnkmunĂŒ|goshangavagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavagmunĂŒ|gokishangavagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavagmushĂ«|shangavagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavagnkmushĂ«|goshangavagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavagmushĂ«|gokishangavagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavagmuro|shangavagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavagnkmuro|goshangavagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavagmuro|gokishangavagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
